Fix: 

please advise on how to debug
How-To-Repeat: 	insert 9.0-REL amd64 boot dvd via usb drive, boot
	The installer asks for Non-Standard Keyboard, hostname,
	and if one asks for guided or manual install, it says
	that the installer was aborted and if one likes to restart.
